docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY MAKHFI, MELODY AS TO DEFENDANT SPINA, MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-05-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED AUG-19-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SPINA, MARIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY THE PLAINTIFF, MELODY MAKHFI AND THE DEFENDANT MARIO SPINA. NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAKHFI, MELODY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPINA, MARIO $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $430.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SPINA, MARIO
